thoughts_pipelinestages_1297953751654.content: Plan agents spent turns reading 658KB compiled CLI from node_modules instead of finding non-existent src/ files — always check if source files exist before reading compiled output

facts_srcclits_1297955186202.content: The fix needed is not adding new logging code but ensuring --feedback is parsed and forwarded into ctx.input.feedback — the logger already exists at cli.js:14742

conventions_srcpipelinecontextts_1297956.content: Build stage injection uses ctx.input.feedback with a 200-char slice limit — any solution must populate this field in the pipeline context

facts_testing_1297958405712.content: TDD approach: write the test first (src/stages/build.test.ts) before modifying source, so the failing test drives the implementation

facts_kody_pipeline_investigation_145163.content: Before reading compiled output, verify the source files exist in src/ — if they're missing, read the compiled code instead of reading node_modules

thoughts_kody_pipeline_investigation_145.content: Plan agents can exhaust turns reading compiled engine output without finding project source files that don't exist

conventions_kody_engine_srcclits_1451641.content: The feedback logging injection for --feedback already exists in compiled cli.js at lines 14742-14743 under def.name === 'build'

thoughts_pipelinestages_1643542309105.content: The engine binary in node_modules is compiled; source files for src/cli.ts, src/pipeline/, src/stages/ don't exist yet — always verify src/ exists before diving into node_modules.

facts_buildstage_1643543808961.content: An empty changeset (no files created) means the feature was never implemented; verification of feature behavior is impossible without implementation.

facts_verification_1643545654274.content: Pre-existing lint errors in unrelated source files can appear during verification — filter by file relevance before treating them as evidence of failure.

conventions_pipeline_metadata_1686352396.content: Kody pipeline metadata lives in .kody-engine/, .kody/, .kody/, .agents/, and skills-lock.json — commits may contain only these files.

facts_engine_verification_1686354288257.content: When verifying features that live in compiled npm packages, check node_modules for the compiled artifact and inspect it directly rather than assuming local src/ files exist.

facts_feedback_flag_implementation_16863.content: The --feedback flag is parsed at line 17529, stored in ctx.input.feedback at line 19246, and logged as feedback: during the build stage at lines 14742–14743 — all in the compiled engine CLI.
